name: Blueberry French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and place half of them in a greased 13x9-inch baking dish.
2. Cut the cream cheese into 1-inch cubes and place over the bread.
3. Top with blueberries and remaining bread.
4. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
5. Add milk and maple syrup; mix well.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the bread arrangement.
7. Cover and chill for 8 hours or overnight.
8. Remove from the refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake for an additional 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and the center is set.
11. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch; add water. Bring to a boil over medium heat; boil for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
12. Stir in blueberries and reduce heat.
13. Simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until berries have burst.
14. Stir in butter until melted.
15. Serve the berry sauce over the French toast.
